productDisplayName: Undercolors of Benetton Men Pack of 2 Vests
description: The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.Pack of two white and grey vests Soft and stretchy vests made from 100% cotton. White and grey vests with high round neck and broad shoulders. The original United Colours Of Benetton printed label features on the inner part of the vest. Classic vest shape and branding combine to create a ultra masculine vest to be worn under any outfit. Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm below 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
